text: Bapu ne aaj panchayat mein announce kar diya ki hum apni pushtaini zameen sahukar ko bechenge karza chukane ke liye. Mummy rone lagi aur kehne lagi ki meri nakamiyabi ki wajah se unhe ye din dekhna pad raha hai aur unka BP badh gaya hai. Mera dimaag sunn ho gaya hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur kuch sujhayi nahi de raha ki ab kya karun.

Bina mujhse pooche bapu ne announce kiya ki chote bhai ki shadi ke liye main aur karza loonga kyunki 'izzat' ka sawal hai. Mummy baar-baar bol rahi hain ki meri wajah se ghar mein kalesh ho raha hai aur agar maine mana kiya toh wo zeher kha lengi. Itni ghabrahat aur dukh ho raha hai ki main khet mein hal tak nahi chala pa raha, bas siskiyaan nikal rahi hain.

Bapu ne aaj decide kiya ki fasal barbaad hone ke baad ab hum sab bhattay par kaam karenge aur mera shehar jane ka sapna khatam. Mummy ne taana maara ki 'sab tumhari manhoosiyat ki wajah se ho raha hai' aur unka heart kamzor ho gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhara hua hai, itni zyada flood of emotions hai ki main agli baarish ke baare mein soch bhi nahi pa raha.

Bapu ne khane par announce kiya ki meri beti ki padhai ab ruk jayegi aur uska rishta pakka kiya jayega. Mummy rona-dhona shuru kar di ki meri wajah se unhe roz bapu ki dant sunni padti hai aur 'log kya kahenge' ki kisan ka beta baap se zaban lada raha hai. Mujhe itna gussa aur frustration mehsus ho raha hai ki mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bas akele baith kar rona aa raha hai.

Bina meri marzi ke bapu ne purani bhains bech di aur sara paisa chacha ke bete ki padhai mein dene ka announce kiya. Mummy keh rahi hain ki 'sab tumhari wajah se ho raha hai' aur unka sukh-chain chheen gaya hai kyunki main unhe khush nahi rakh pa raha. Main poori tarah se toot gaya hoon, bas rona hi nikal raha hai aur andhera lag raha hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha kaise handle karun.
